examples: My canvas just happens to be Wall Street and my brushes are the money managers for whom SkyBridge raises capital.
Ever the negotiator, he ensured that SkyBridge got on-screen publicity as the sponsor of a gala attended by Gordon Gekko, the film's main character.
I dutifully visit the buildings' "skybridge", the mid-air walkway connecting the two, and wander through immaculately landscaped parks and air-conditioned shopping malls.
The company is closing off a skybridge connecting the parking garage to the office building, so workers will have to walk a longer route to get to the office, passing pedestrians along the way.
